heading: Approval and entry into force of the Agreement
label: 4011 Approval and entry into force of the Agreement

Effective and Termination DatesSection effective on the date the Dominican Republic-Central America-United States Free Trade Agreement enters into force () and to cease to have effect on the date the Agreement ceases to be in force with respect to the United States, and, during any period in which a country ceases to be a CAFTA–DR country, to cease to have effect with respect to such country, see , set out as a note under .Mar. 1, 2006section 107 of Pub. L. 109–53section 4001 of this title

children.heading: Approval of Agreement and statement of administrative action
children.label: a Approval of Agreement and statement of administrative action

children.text: the Dominican Republic-Central America-United States Free Trade Agreement entered into on , with the Governments of Costa Rica, the Dominican Republic, El Salvador, Guatemala, Honduras, and Nicaragua, and submitted to the Congress on ; andAugust 5, 2004June 23, 2005
the statement of administrative action proposed to implement the Agreement that was submitted to the Congress on .June 23, 2005

children.heading: Conditions for entry into force of the Agreement
children.label: b Conditions for entry into force of the Agreement
children.text: At such time as the President determines that countries listed in subsection (a)(1) have taken measures necessary to comply with the provisions of the Agreement that are to take effect on the date on which the Agreement enters into force, the President is authorized to provide for the Agreement to enter into force with respect to those countries that provide for the Agreement to enter into force for them.
